rag_rules: Use `guarantee "label": expression;` to express output constraints.
Place component type contracts (assumptions, guarantees, constants, equations) inside `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
generic_rules: Use case-provided thresholds and visible feature names in contracts.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees.
Ensure AGREE types (int, real, bool) are correctly declared.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations.
Use `const name : type = value;` for constant declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope notes beyond component type/implementation placement
Assumed Type vs Actual Type (type alignment is handled elsewhere)
AGREE Scalar Type Names (type checking is handled elsewhere)
